name: @curaos/contracts
description: CuraOS bulk-import contracts. The import-job mold (directory/archive/file modes, failed-row quarantine with reason, seen/merged/needs-review counts, person-facing status projection) plus a CSV adapter (row->record mapping, duplicate prevention, extract columns). Port-adapted from WorldVistA health-data-standards BulkRecordImporter (Apache-2.0, fresh TypeScript, no source copied).
